generated_note: Hand-maintained registry. 'enabled' stations are the only ones historical_data.py/station_features.py may actually fetch from. Every 'enabled: false' entry is an unverified candidate - proposed from general knowledge of the Swiss station network, never confirmed against a live provider API, and must never be treated as real coverage. See docs/STATION_RESEARCH.md for the narrative version of this same list, including rejected candidates.

stations.name: Samedan
stations.licence: MeteoSwiss Open Data (opendata.swiss terms of use - attribution required, commercial use permitted)
stations.notes: 10km from the Silvaplana target lake, in the Upper Engadin (same broad target region as the lake). fu3010h0/fu3010h1 columns confirmed against the live MeteoSwiss STAC API. Historical fallback ground truth for backtest.py labeling (kitesailing.ch has no archive); real lake correlation is only ~0.52, an acknowledged accuracy ceiling - see CLAUDE.md.

stations.name: Lugano
stations.licence: MeteoSwiss Open Data (opendata.swiss terms of use)
stations.notes: Southern term of the Lugano-Zurich pressure-gradient signal already used by features.py (pressure_signal, pressure_nowcast_score). pp0qffh0 (QFF sea-level pressure) confirmed against the live API.

stations.name: Zürich / Fluntern
stations.licence: MeteoSwiss Open Data (opendata.swiss terms of use)
stations.notes: Northern term of the same pressure-gradient signal. pp0qffh0 confirmed against the live API.

stations.name: Corvatsch (summit)
stations.licence: unknown - presumed MeteoSwiss Open Data if it is a full SwissMetNet member
stations.notes: Cable-car-served summit station used for avalanche/ski operations. Whether it is a full SwissMetNet station (vs. SLF/IMIS-only or ski-operator-only) is unconfirmed - proposed station code, not verified against a live fetch.

stations.name: Piz Nair (St. Moritz)
stations.notes: No station code could be proposed with any confidence. May only be SLF/IMIS or ski-operator instrumented, not MeteoSwiss.

stations.name: Maloja
stations.notes: One of Switzerland's oldest continuously operated climate stations (long precipitation/temperature record) - moderate confidence a MeteoSwiss station exists here, but the exact current API station code was not confirmed against a live fetch.

stations.name: Sils / Segl
stations.notes: Lake immediately upstream of Silvaplana - highest-priority candidate for a future confirmed sync if a real station exists here, but no station code could be confirmed this session.

stations.name: Vicosoprano
stations.notes: IMPORTANT: these coordinates are already used in features.py as an Open-Meteo FORECAST-MODEL grid point, not a real ground station. No evidence was found that Vicosoprano hosts an actual MeteoSwiss station - do not conflate the two.

stations.name: Poschiavo
stations.notes: Proposed as an eastern/Bernina-flow-suppression context station - station code not confirmed against a live fetch.

stations.name: Chur
stations.notes: Well-known long-record station north of the Engadin - moderate confidence it exists in the current API under some code, not confirmed this session.
